goal: Pull the actual turn logs and analyze them to see if the pattern of lingering emotional state and stacking stimuli shows up in practice.

plan_steps.description: Identify the location of the turn logs.
Read and parse the turn logs into a structured format.
acceptance_criteria: Parsed data is saved in a structured file (e.g., JSON).

plan_steps.description: Analyze the parsed turn logs for patterns of lingering emotional state and stacking stimuli.
acceptance_criteria: Analysis results indicating patterns are generated.

plan_steps.description: Summarize the findings from the analysis.
acceptance_criteria: A summary report detailing the identified patterns is created.

spoken_summary: I don't have the actual turn logs or analysis details from your steps — they all came back empty. Can you share what you found, or would you like me to help you locate and parse those logs?
